options.content:
VEHICLE SYSTEMS OVERVIEW
Live OBD-II telemetry · InfluxDB time-series · diagnostics control center
TELEMETRY LIVE AUTO REFRESH 5s OBD-II
Dashboard
Vehicle Telemetry
bucket: vehicle-data · measurement: vehicle_telemetry
LIVE OPERATING STATE LIVE · LAST VALUE

targets.query:
from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "rpm")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "speed")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "engine_load")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "coolant")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "fuel_level")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "module_voltage")
  |> last()

options.content: POWERTRAIN PERFORMANCE LIVE · LAST VALUE

targets.query:
from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "rpm")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "speed")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rpm" or r._field == "speed")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "throttle")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "maf")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "intake_pressure")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "timing_advance")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "engine_runtime")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "distance_mil")
  |> last()

options.content: THERMAL & VEHICLE HEALTH LIVE · LAST VALUE

targets.query:
from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "coolant" or r._field == "intake_temp" or r._field == "ambient_temp" or r._field == "oil_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "engine_load" or r._field == "throttle")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "oil_temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "intake_temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "ambient_temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "distance_cleared")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "fuel_level")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry" and r._field == "coolant")
  |> last()

options.content: DIAGNOSTICS / DTC MONITOR LIVE · LAST VALUE

targets.query:
from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_dtc" and r._field == "dtc_codes")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "source_ecu", "vehicle_id", "device_id"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 5)
  |> rename(columns: {_time: "Time", _value: "DTC Codes", source_ecu: "ECU", vehicle_id: "Vehicle", device_id: "Device"})

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_dtc" and r._field == "dtc_count")
  |> last()

options.content:
DTC Control
Sends OBD Mode 04 through Node-RED. Use only after recording the current DTCs.
CLEAR DTC
Endpoint: Node-RED /clear-dtc?confirm=YES
TREND ANALYTICS LIVE · LAST VALUE

targets.query:
from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "maf" or r._field == "intake_pressure" or r._field == "timing_advance")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "vehicle-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle_telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "module_voltage" or r._field == "fuel_level" or r._field == "distance_mil" or r._field == "distance_cleared")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
